emotional_tone: Focused, authoritative, clear, and encouraging. Optimized for study and concentration without unnecessary distractions.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, or p-12 for major containers.

grid_modes.dashboard: Control Room Grid (Dense). Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gap (gap-4 or gap-6).
grid_modes.landing_bento: Tetris Grid. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12. Wide gap (gap-8).

spacing_and_layout.mcq_interface: Use a clear split or central focus. Options should be stacked vertically with ample padding (p-4) and 1px border. Do not center text; left-align all question and option text.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, and list items. Center hero headings only if visually balanced.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Grid Borders (Technical Look). 1px solid border (#E5E7EB), flat background, no shadow by default. Hover: slight shadow (shadow-sm) and border color darkens.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.mcq_options: Neumorphic / Crisp. 1px solid border (#E5E7EB). On hover: border becomes #93C5FD. On selected (before submit): neutral_selection style. On Correct: success style. On Wrong: error style.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glass. bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl with a 1px delicate bottom border (border-gray-200).

components.strategy: Shadcn UI for logic (Dropdowns, Dialogs, Progress), pure HTML/Tailwind for creative landing grids and MCQ structures.
components.buttons: Sharp edges or minimal rounded (rounded-md). High contrast primary buttons (bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700).
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs heavily customized to have 1px crisp borders, focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements must change state on hover. Buttons lift (-translate-y-[1px]) and deepen in color.
motion_and_interaction.mcq_reveal: Use staggered fade-in for AI explanations. The correct/wrong color transition on options should be snappy (duration-150 ease-out).
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Subtle opacity fade and slide-up (translate-y-2 to 0) on mount.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use icons for clear signposting (Timer, Bookmarks, Results, Dashboard widgets).

hero_image.description: Woman working late at a desk filled with books, representing focused study and preparation.

dashboard_empty_state.description: Young man studying indoors, focused on reading. Good for empty states or profile defaults.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Text primary (#111827) on surface (#FFFFFF) is highly accessible.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='mcq-option-a', data-testid='submit-exam-button').
accessibility.focus_rings: Explicit focus rings on all keyboard navigation elements (focus-visible:ring-2).

instructions_to_main_agent: Import 'Hind Vadodara', 'Outfit', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.css.
Use 'Outfit' for UI shells, nav, and generic text. Use 'Hind Vadodara' strictly for Gujarati questions, options, and AI explanations.
Implement the Dashboard using a dense 'Control Room' grid.
For MCQ practice, do not use Shadcn Cards. Use raw divs with flat borders and distinct correct/wrong visual states.
Ensure 'AI Explanation' sections stand out slightly using an 'organic' or subtle background tint (like bg-blue-50/50 with a left blue border).
Remember to implement the Timer using 'JetBrains Mono' for monospace tabular numbers.
